views.settings.title: Preferences — MarkLocal
views.settings.copyImages: Copy external images into the document folder
views.settings.allowHtml: Allow inline HTML in Markdown (not recommended)
views.settings.customCss.hint: Applied after the theme CSS. Lets you tweak typography, width, colors, and more.
views.settings.assoc.on: Current status: .md/.markdown files open with MarkLocal.
views.settings.assoc.off: Current status: .md/.markdown files do not open with MarkLocal.
views.settings.assoc.created: Association created. You may need to close and reopen File Explorer to see it.
views.settings.shellNew.on: Current status: the Explorer "New" menu includes "New Markdown".
views.settings.shellNew.off: Current status: the Explorer "New" menu does NOT include "New Markdown".
views.settings.shellNew.enabledBody:
Done. The Explorer context menu → "New" will now show "Markdown Document".

If you don't see it right away, close and open a new File Explorer window.
views.settings.shellNew.disabledBody: "New Markdown" removed from the Explorer context menu.
views.settings.customCss.needFile: First choose an existing CSS file.
views.settings.customCss.templateCreated: Template created. Click "Save" to apply it, or "Open in editor" to edit it right here.
views.settings.langRestartBody: The language change will take effect when you restart the application.
views.find.title: Find and replace
views.find.wrapped: Wrapped to the start of the document.
views.recovery.title: MarkLocal recovery
views.recovery.subtitle: Select a draft and click Recover, or discard it so you don't see it again.
views.recovery.header.single: An unsaved draft from a previous session was found.
views.recovery.header.multiple: {0} unsaved drafts from previous sessions were found.
